source_jobs.title: Legal Counsel
source_jobs.description:
View our much better version of this job spec on our careers page: https://juro.notion.site/legal-counsel



***




THE KEY BITS



 - Location: We can currently only accept applications from candidates that are located and have long-term working rights in the UK.

 - Flexibility: We operate a choice-first work approach https://juro.notion.site/choice-first-work that lets you work fully remotely from Day One even if you’re near an office hub.

 - Salary: We benchmarked ca. £80,000 + equity at MN2 in our progression framework https://juro.notion.site/progression for someone based in the UK. This equates to roughly 2-4 years’ PQE. If you like the look of the role but the salary doesn’t match what you’re looking for, let us know in the application.

 - Interviews: 3 stages totalling around 3 hours over 2-3 weeks.

 - Start date: As soon as you can start.

 - Reporting to: Michael Haynes, General Counsel

 - More info: The FAQ below, juro.com/careers http://juro.com/careers, our handbook https://juro.notion.site/handbook or ask talent@juro.com anything.






HELP US HELP THE WORLD AGREE FASTER




Juro has big ambitions: to become the go-to platform for agreeing and managing contracts globally. And we'll need help doing it.

Legal tech is on the rise, with Goldman Sachs estimating that 44% of legal tasks can be automated https://www.law.com/legaltechnews/2023/03/30/legal-industry-reacts-to-goldman-sachs-generative-ai-report-keep-calm-and-panic/?slreturn=20231019075707 with generative AI. With the brand we have built and the agility of early stage we are well placed to capture this opportunity.



Most legal teams scale by hiring more lawyers. Juro’s doesn’t.

We run Legal as an operating system: routine work is eliminated, automated or self-served, most deals close without a lawyer touching them, human time is reserved for critical judgement calls.



You can read more about this approach in our Legal strategy 2026-27 https://app.notion.com/p/Legal-strategy-2026-27-2cd82de44b5380a791cfcdc98e33ca2e?pvs=21.



The model works. But it’s created a new problem: the judgement calls that do get through are getting bigger and harder as we scale. Record deal volumes, larger deals, enterprise counterparties with big legal departments of their own… right now, every judgement call lands on Michael https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaelhaynes/, our General Counsel.

That's where you come in.



Your mission is to give Juro the confidence to scale fast. That means:

 - You own the system (not the queue) for commercial contracts.

 - You’ll negotiate the deals that genuinely need a lawyer, directly with the other side, with agency to make decisions that you are accountable for.

 - You’ll make sure fewer deals need a lawyer: refining templates and playbooks, supervising AI review, fixing systems whenever the same question reaches you twice.



Within 6 months, success means:

 - Deals that need a lawyer get you (not the GC) and close faster for it.

 - 90%+ of deals close with no lawyer involved at all because you have made the system better.

 - You work AI-first. Juro runs the most AI-leveraged legal function you’ll find; we expect you to push it further.



Customer deals are the tip of the spear but not the whole job. The same model covers everything else a scaling AI business sends Legal’s way: vendor contracts, data protection work, compliance, marketing claims, the occasional dispute.

You’ll own the systems for all of it — playbooks, thresholds, AI triage — handle the exceptions yourself and escalate to the GC only where the risk warrants it. You’ll also get exposure to the company-level work Michael leads: corporate, governance, employment, strategic projects.



We care about building a diverse team where everyone feels they belong. That’s why our perks & benefits https://juro.notion.site/benefits and choice-first work https://juro.notion.site/choice-first-work approach are designed with inclusivity in mind. Read more in our diversity,

source_jobs.title: Legal Engineer
source_jobs.description:
View our much better version of this job spec on our careers page: https://juro.notion.site/legal-engineer-us https://juro.notion.site/legal-engineer-us?source=copy_link



***




THE KEY BITS



 - Location: We can currently only accept applications from candidates that are located in Massachusetts and have long-term working rights in the US.

 - Flexibility: We have office hubs in London and Boston, as well as no-office hubs in several European countries. We operate a choice-first work approach https://juro.notion.site/choice-first-work that lets you work fully remotely from Day One even if you’re near an office hub.

 - Salary: We benchmarked ca. $110,000 + 20% bonus + equity at IC3 level in our progression framework https://www.notion.so/juro/Progression-framework-c9acbf27ec464b81b5bd4b3a22abe6dc?pvs=24 for someone based in Boston.

 - Interviews: 3 stages totalling around 3 hours over 2-3 weeks.

 - Start date: As soon as you can start.

 - Reporting to: Sharen Gill, Director of Implementation → Sharen will be on maternity leave from mid-July. During this period, you'll report directly to Josephine Hanschke, Head of Customer Success.

 - More info: The FAQ below, juro.com/careers http://juro.com/careers, our handbook https://juro.notion.site/handbook or ask talent@juro.com anything.




HELP US HELP THE WORLD AGREE FASTER




Juro has big ambitions: to become the go-to platform for agreeing and managing contracts globally. And we'll need help doing it.

Legal tech is on the rise, with Goldman Sachs estimating that 44% of legal tasks can be automated https://www.law.com/legaltechnews/2023/03/30/legal-industry-reacts-to-goldman-sachs-generative-ai-report-keep-calm-and-panic/?slreturn=20231019075707 with generative AI. With the brand we have built and the agility of early stage we are well placed to capture this opportunity.



Juro’s AI-powered contract platform is backed by a stellar Customer Success team with industry-leading satisfaction scores, letting new customers manage contracts at scale in hours, not weeks.

Most LegalTech vendors deliver the opposite: protracted, scattered onboarding and thin support. The result? Customers lose excitement, use the platform less and eventually abandon it altogether.

We’re hiring to stay ahead — expanding the team so every customer continues to see rapid, effortless value from day one.

Your mission is to deliver value to our paying customers, ensuring full end-user adoption and stickiness in their org, while being the voice of the customer internally.



Success for you by month 3 means:

 1. You’re comfortably juggling ~25+ live customers, managing multi-layer, multi-phase onboarding, tailoring delivery to each customer’s specific needs

 2. You confidently serve as a technical expert - specialising across integrations, actively participating as a technical consultant to customers/prospects and internally

 3. You run AI-augmented projects, coaching customers on AI workflows and best practices



We care about building a diverse team where everyone feels they belong. That’s why our perks & benefits https://juro.notion.site/benefits and choice-first work https://juro.notion.site/choice-first-work approach are designed with inclusivity in mind. Read more in our diversity, inclusion & belonging hub https://juro.notion.site/dei.






WHO WE LOOK FOR



Research shows that while men apply to jobs if they meet ~60% of criteria, women and those in traditionally under-represented groups tend to apply only if they check all boxes. So if you think you have what it takes but don't meet every single point above, please still get in touch. We'd love to have a chat and see if you could be a great fit.



We look for people whose approach to work aligns with our [Principles](<https://app.notion.com/p/Principles-acf77a5d174f427eb46aa3134a206296?pvs=21>). For this role, we particularly value:

 - Prioritisation: You can juggle several projects at once and still focus on what matters most.

 - C

source_jobs.title: Finance Lead (8-month maternity cover)
source_jobs.description:
View our much better version of this job spec on our careers page: https://juro.notion.site/hof-matcover



***




THE KEY BITS



 - Location: We can currently only accept applications from candidates that are located and have long-term working rights in the UK.

 - Flexibility: We operate a choice-first work approach https://juro.notion.site/choice-first-work that lets you work fully remotely from Day One even if you’re near an office hub.

 - Salary: We benchmarked ca. £100-120,000 per annum (pro-rata’d for an 8-month stint) + equity at MN1-2 level in our progression framework https://juro.notion.site/progression for someone based in the UK.

 - Interviews: 2 stages totalling around 2 hours over 2 weeks.

 - Start date / duration: 2 Nov, 2026 — June 30, 2027

 - Reporting to: Richard Mabey, CEO

 - Direct reports: Charlotte (Financial Controller) + Irina (Finance Ops Associate)

 - More info: The FAQ below, juro.com/careers http://juro.com/careers, our handbook https://juro.notion.site/handbook or ask talent@juro.com anything.






HELP US HELP THE WORLD AGREE FASTER




Juro has big ambitions: to become the go-to platform for agreeing and managing contracts globally. And we'll need help doing it.

Legal tech is on the rise, with Goldman Sachs estimating that 44% of legal tasks can be automated https://www.law.com/legaltechnews/2023/03/30/legal-industry-reacts-to-goldman-sachs-generative-ai-report-keep-calm-and-panic/?slreturn=20231019075707 with generative AI. With the brand we have built and the agility of early stage we are well placed to capture this opportunity.



Eimear (our Director of Finance) is heading off on maternity leave, and we're looking for an interim finance leader to hold the seat for ~8 months (November to June).

This isn't a caretaker role. Your mission is to give the CEO, Board and exec team the numbers and the judgement they need to make good calls.

To do that, you'll lead a Financial Controller and an Analyst who are covering month-end, and you'll be hands-on on everything else.



Success means:

 1. Run and improve the full FP&A process from day one (monthly reforecast, board packs, monthly exec business reviews)

 2. Support the CEO and exec team on board and investor reporting, and on strategic finance projects as they arise

 3. Oversee the 2027 audit

 4. Lead the finance team (advising, not running, month-end)



We care about building a diverse team where everyone feels they belong. That’s why our perks & benefits https://juro.notion.site/benefits and choice-first work https://juro.notion.site/choice-first-work approach are designed with inclusivity in mind. Read more in our diversity, inclusion & belonging hub https://juro.notion.site/dei.






WHO WE LOOK FOR



Research shows that while men apply to jobs if they meet ~60% of criteria, women and those in traditionally under-represented groups tend to apply only if they check all boxes. So if you think you have what it takes but don't meet every single point above, please still get in touch. We'd love to have a chat and see if you could be a great fit.



To succeed here:

Every Juror finds their balance across our four core principles https://app.notion.com/p/Principles-acf77a5d174f427eb46aa3134a206296?pvs=21 — we hire, develop and celebrate people who live them every day.

Curious how you’d fit? Try our personality quiz https://my-juro-personality.lovable.app/ to see how you map against our principles.



On top of that, you have been part of a journey where:

 - You've built and owned an FP&A process, not just worked inside someone else's

 - You're accounting-literate = can support and challenge a controller, even if you're not the one closing the books

 - You've supported major corporate transactions or diligence processes from the finance seat and know what they actually demand

 - You've partnered directly with execs and a board

 - You've led a small finance team

 - You've been hands-on and energised by rolling up your sleeve

notes: Small job board with mixed roles, no explicit sponsorship or clearance info
